raw_response:
I agree with the assessment provided by @Agent1. Detergent (Option D) may indeed not always be included in every brand of denture cleaning tablets since alternatives such as enzyme-based systems could achieve similar results more gently. Additionally, detergents have specific requirements regarding concentration and formulation to ensure they do no damage to plastic materials often found in dentures. This makes their inclusion less universal compared to other components listed.

Answer: D remains my selection. Given this rationale, **I select Option D**.
